subcodes.first_line: O Lord of pardon and forgiveness, Concealer of faults and Swift in bestowing bounty, Thou Who hast praised Thyself in clear terms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رب العفو و الغفران و ستار العیوب و سریع الاحسان و اثنیت علی نفسک فی صریح
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @imagery in the Qur'an
